start_message:
👋 Welcome to the bot!

Please use the buttons below:
rules_text:
📜 Bot Rules

• 🚫 No spamming
• ⚠️ No insults or harassment
• 📢 No unauthorized advertising
support_text:
🛠️ If you have any issues, please contact support

💬 Support: @your_support_username
font_prompt: 🎨 Please enter the text you want to convert to fonts:
font_more: 🎨 {count} more fonts available. Try again to see all.
font_error: ❌ Error generating fonts. Please try again.
unknown_command: ❌ Invalid command. Please use the menu buttons.
error: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
maintenance: Bot is under maintenance. Please check back later.
blocked: ⚠️ You have been blocked for {duration} seconds due to spam.
not_admin: ⛔ You don't have access to this section.
